title: All Your Beauty Lyrics Goli Soda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: All your beauty
Singer: Gana Bala
Music: SN Arunagiri
Lyrics: Gaana Bala, Mani Amudhavan

All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
fine quality, un personality
padichu paaru English-u paper naanadi
naan fair n lovely pottu vandha super man-adi

Koyambedu market-ula vandhu paarudi
naan koni mootta thookkuravan, aana eennadi?

Up-u down-u vazhkayila vandhu pogumdi
naan appa kooda unnavittu pogamatendi

Baltti adipendi,usura kalti koduppendi
nee ippa sollu noorupera
solatti adipendi

All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
fine quality, un personality

Paarkka paarkka vandhadhamma love thaandi
un paarvayaala bathila sonna, yes thaandi

Vellakaari pol adhegam minuminukkudhu
oru thanni lory pola vandhu enna idikkudhu (2)

Satayellaam palaplanuthaana irukkudhu
adhula achchadicha vasagamthaan enna mirattudhu (2)

Un manasa thirudave vandha kallan thaanadi
enn bayampuruthum unga appan ennaku villanthaandai.

All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
All your beauty, azhagu kannaadi
fine quality, un personality
padichu paaru English-u paper naanadi
naan fair n lovely pottu vandha super man-adi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the singer of the song All Your Beauty?

The song is sung by the talented Gaana Bala.

What is the theme of the movie Goli Soda?

The movie portrays the struggles and triumphs of a group of young individuals striving to establish their identity.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music was composed by SN Arunagiri.

When was the movie Goli Soda released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

What is the mood of the song All Your Beauty?

The song has an energetic and motivational vibe.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song All Your Beauty from the 2014 Tamil movie Goli Soda is a lively and energetic track that reflects the youthful spirit and determination of its characters. Sung by Gaana Bala and composed by SN Arunagiri, the song features a unique blend of folk and motivational elements. The lyrics, penned by Gaana Bala and Mani Amuthavan, convey a message of self-confidence and resilience. This track is a perfect representation of the movie's theme of overcoming challenges and finding one's identity.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: All Your Beauty, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Goli Soda, showcases the unique vocal style of Gaana Bala combined with the dynamic composition of SN Arunagiri. This song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the spirit of resilience. Dive into this captivating number that resonates with the lively and motivational themes of the film.
stanzaMeanings: All your beauty, beautiful mirror. All your beauty, beautiful mirror. Look at your fine qualities and personality. I am like an English paper, I came with fairness and loveliness, like a super man.
Come and see me at Koyambedu market, I am a big guy, but what about me?
Life goes up and down, I can't go without you, even with my father.
You are the one who gives life and energy, now tell me, do you really mean it?
All your beauty, beautiful mirror. All your beauty, beautiful mirror. Look at your fine qualities and personality.
When I see you, it feels like love has come. When I look at you, I say yes to your gaze.
Like a white flower, it shines brightly. It feels like a drop of water has come to me.
Everything is in a mess, but in that, the beautiful words are what I want to express.
Your heart has been stolen by a thief, and I am scared of what your father will do to me.
All your beauty, beautiful mirror. All your beauty, beautiful mirror. Look at your fine qualities and personality. I am like an English paper, I came with fairness and loveliness, like a super man.
